title: Add Files section with registries.conf to pertinent man pages
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Adds a "Files" section to the four man pages that make use of registries.conf and adds an entry for registries.conf to each.  No code changes, just man page updates.

comments.body: Talked with @nalind, I'm a little concerned about adding doc about policy.json so I've just added the new F28 link to policy.json(5).
Ok All green. I will merge.

:pushpin: Commit d07d01d has been approved by `rhatdan`
